# Steward Weekly
> Free weekly newsletter keeping independent landlords up to date on rental law changes across all 50 US states.

## Key pages
- Homepage: www.stewardweekly.com
- Newsletter signup: www.stewardweekly.com/#subscribe

## What we cover
- New landlord-tenant legislation (state, county, city level)
- Lease & document compliance tips
- State-specific rental law alerts
- Plain-English summaries of legal changes

## Who it's for
Independent landlords managing 1-10 rental properties in the US.

## Stats
- 17M+ independent landlords targeted
- 50 states covered
- 3,200+ local rental law changes tracked in 2024
